SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Manage all your settings in one place.

ITEMS.BUSINESS_SETTINGS_DESC: Customise business details, manage branches, covered addresses and etc.
ITEMS.ROUNDING_SETTINGS_DESC: Configure how numbers are adjusted to a specific level of precision.
ITEMS.BRANCH_SETTINGS_DESC: Manage your branch details, addresses, working hours, and operational settings.
ITEMS.CUSTOM_FIELDS_DESC: Add your fields and define the location rules.
ITEMS.PRODUCTS_TAB_BUILDER_DESC: Define the default content tabs shown on every product.
ITEMS.IMAGE_DISPLAY_DESC: Set how product images are cropped and positioned across the storefront.
ITEMS.PREFIX_SETTINGS_DESC: Customize the prefixes for various document types.
ITEMS.POS_OPTIONS_DESC: Configure and manage point of sale options, including cashier settings, sales restrictions, printing preferences.
ITEMS.INVOICE_OPTIONS_DESC: Configure invoice options, default notes, terms and conditions.
ITEMS.MANAGE_TAX_DESC: Configure tax rates, tax groups, and tax rules for your business transactions.
ITEMS.LABEL_BUILDER_DESC: Design and manage custom label templates for your products.
ITEMS.PRICE_LABEL_DESC: Create and manage price label templates for your products.
ITEMS.SURCHARGE_DESC: Configure surcharge rules, amounts, and application methods.
ITEMS.COVERED_ADDRESS_DESC: Define and manage addresses where your business provides delivery or service.
ITEMS.COVERED_ZONE_DESC: Set up and manage specific geographic zones for delivery or service.
ITEMS.SHIPPING_DESC: Set up and manage shipping methods and rates.
ITEMS.SHIPPING_OPTIONS_DESC: Configure additional shipping options and preferences.
ITEMS.PAYMENT_METHODS_DESC: Payment methods, currencies, and configuration for linking to POS and website.
ITEMS.SERVICE_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Configure the services your business offers, including service types and pricing.
ITEMS.IMPORT_FROM_INVO_DESC: Import company data from another Invo account.

BUSINESS.IDENTITY_DESC: How your business appears across the app, on receipts, and in customer-facing pages.
BUSINESS.LOGO_HINT: Square images render best. Used in the sidebar, receipts, and exported invoices.
BUSINESS.NAME: Business name
BUSINESS.SLUG_HINT: Auto-generated identifier — used in URLs and integrations. Read-only.
BUSINESS.LOCALE_DESC: Country, currency and rounding behaviour. Country and currency are set during registration; rounding is editable.
BUSINESS.SMALLEST_CURRENCY_HINT: The smallest cash denomination in your currency (e.g. 0.005). Used to round cash totals.
BUSINESS.TAX_DESC: Tax identifier and how prices are entered for this business.
BUSINESS.INCLUSIVE_TAX_HINT: When enabled, the prices you enter on products are treated as tax-inclusive.

BRANCHES.EMPTY: No branches yet. Click "Add branch" to create the first one.
BRANCHES.NAME: Branch name
BRANCHES.OPENING_TIME_HINT: When this branch starts its day. Detailed open/close periods per day go under Working hours.
BRANCHES.MAP_DRAG_HINT: Drag the pin (or click anywhere) so it matches the exact location of your branch.
BRANCHES.ONLINE_AVAILABILITY: Online sales available for this branch
BRANCHES.ONLINE_AVAILABILITY_HINT: Customers can place orders against this branch from the online storefront.
BRANCHES.MAIN_BRANCH_HINT: Used as the company-level fallback for reports and exports.
BRANCHES.INCLUSIVE_TAX: Prices on this branch include tax
BRANCHES.INCLUSIVE_TAX_HINT: Overrides the company-wide tax-inclusive setting for branch-specific pricing.
BRANCHES.LOCKED_BY_DEFAULT: (can't disable on the storefront default branch)
BRANCHES.WORKING_HOURS_DESC: Hours during which staff is on-site and the branch is open to customers.
BRANCHES.DELIVERY_TIMES_DESC: Hours during which the branch accepts and dispatches delivery orders.
BRANCHES.SECTION_IDENTITY_DESC: How customers and staff recognise this branch.
BRANCHES.SECTION_OPERATIONS_DESC: Branch operating preferences such as closing time.
BRANCHES.SECTION_OPTIONS_DESC: Toggles that change how this branch behaves in the storefront and reports.
BRANCHES.EDIT_LOCATION_HINT: Update the address shown to customers and the coordinates used by the storefront map.
BRANCHES.MAP_LOCATION_HINT: Latitude and longitude pinpoint the branch on the map. Paste them from a Google Maps link if you don't know them.
BRANCHES.MAP_NEEDS_COORDS: Add latitude and longitude to preview the map.
BRANCHES.NO_COORDS: No coordinates yet — click Edit to add the address and pinpoint this branch on the map.

WORKING_HOURS.COPY_TO_ALL_HINT: Stamp this day's hours onto every other day.
WORKING_HOURS.TO_AFTER_FROM: End time must be after start time.
WORKING_HOURS.OVERLAPPING: Periods overlap — adjust the times so they don't conflict.
WORKING_HOURS.COPY_BANNER_TITLE: Copy these opening hours to all days?

CUSTOM_FIELDS.SECTION_EMPTY: No custom fields are defined for this entity yet.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.LIST_SUBTITLE: Pick the entity you want to extend with extra information.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.MANAGER_SUBTITLE: Define the extra inputs that will appear on every form for this entity.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.ACTIVE_SUB: Drag to reorder. Click a row to edit its settings.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.EMPTY_ACTIVE: No fields yet — start by adding one.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.TRASH_SUB: Soft-deleted fields are hidden from forms but kept here so you can restore them.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.NAME: Label
CUSTOM_FIELDS.SLUG_HINT: Used in storage. Lowercase letters, numbers and underscores only.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.SLUG_TAKEN: Another field already uses this identifier.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.REQUIRED_HINT: Users must fill this field before saving.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.MULTI_SELECT_HINT: Users can pick more than one option.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.CLEARABLE_HINT: Show a clear (×) button on the dropdown.
CUSTOM_FIELDS.OPTIONS_EMPTY: Add at least one option for users to pick from.

TYPE_DESC.TEXT: A single line of plain text.
TYPE_DESC.DATE: A single date with no time component.
TYPE_DESC.SELECT: Pick from a predefined list of options.
TYPE_DESC.COLOR: Pick a HEX color from a swatch.

TYPE_PICKER.TITLE: Choose field type
TYPE_PICKER.SUBTITLE: Pick the input that fits the data you'll be capturing on this entity.

IMAGE_DISPLAY.CONTROLS_DESC: Pick how product images render on cards and listing tiles.
IMAGE_DISPLAY.FIT_HINT: Cover crops to fill, Contain shows the whole image, Fill stretches.
IMAGE_DISPLAY.POSITION_HINT: Pick which part of the image stays visible when it has to crop.
IMAGE_DISPLAY.PREVIEW_DESC: How the same image renders at three common card aspect ratios.
